fix_summary: The knowledge service search logic was updated from AND to OR matching across topic, title, and content, and the targeted service tests passed.
approval_reasons: The implementation is scoped to backend/app/services/knowledge_service.py and the corresponding service tests, matching the requested narrow fix.
Search now uses disjunctive matching via SQLAlchemy or_ across the three fields while preserving active-only filtering and ordering.
The provided automated tests passed, which is the source of truth for this change.
